title: nephrolepis exaltata var. biserrata
intro: Nephrolepis exaltata var. biserrata, commonly known as the Boston fern or rabbit's foot fern, is a type of flowering plant in the family Davalliaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Nephrolepis exaltata var. biserrata include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve respiratory health, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although its use should be consulted with a healthcare professional due to potential interactions with medications.
